title: Implement lightweight model registry
description: Implement a lightweight model registry to track ML model versions, hyperparameters, metrics, and artifacts. Addresses the known gap in ML Rigor category (system health score). Registry should track: model name, version, training date, dataset hash, hyperparameters, validation metrics, artifact path, status (active/archived). JSON-based storage in scripts/ml_ops/.

florentino_gate.reason: Model registry closes ML Rigor gap — directly improves system health score from 92 to potentially 96.

build.notes: model_registry.py created with ModelEntry dataclass, ModelRegistry class (register, promote, archive, get_production, list_models, get_model), semantic versioning, thread-safe file locking (fcntl.flock), JSON persistence. Empty model_registry.json initialized.

domain_sanity.notes: Jose Mourinho: YES — semantic versioning and promotion workflow are industry standard. Andy Flower: YES — no cricket domain impact, infrastructure only. Pep Guardiola: YES — structurally coherent, follows pathlib patterns.

enforcement.notes: Tom Brady: Loop followed. Registry integrates with retrain_pipeline.py (which already had REGISTRY_PATH stub). system_health_score.py ML Rigor check will detect registry presence.

system_check.notes: N'Golo Kante: Schema intact. Registry JSON created. ML Rigor gap addressed — model versioning check in system_health_score.py now passes. No regressions.

post_task_note.what_changed: Lightweight model registry implemented. Tracks model versions, hyperparameters, metrics, artifact paths, and status (production/candidate/archived/experimental). Thread-safe JSON persistence with file locking.
post_task_note.assumption_tested: JSON-based registry is sufficient for current scale (< 50 models) — confirmed. No need for MLflow or database-backed registry at this stage.
post_task_note.risk_introduced: None — additive infrastructure. Degrades gracefully if registry file is missing.
post_task_note.usp: Closes ML Rigor gap that was capping system health score at 92. Model versioning enables reproducible experiments and clean promotion workflows.

2026-02-28T00:00:00Z.detail: Created model_registry.py with full CRUD API. ModelEntry dataclass with all required fields. Thread-safe locking via fcntl. Semantic versioning with bump helpers. Empty registry JSON initialized.

2026-02-28T01:00:00Z.detail: All gates passed. Registry existence unblocks ML Rigor score improvement. Board updated.
